'''Riley Lumb''' (born 18 December 2004) is an English  professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[Hunslet RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]], on loan from the [[Leeds Rhinos]].

==Career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
Lumb made his debut in round 9 of the [[2024 Super League season]] for the Rhinos against [[Hull FC]], scoring two tries.<ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/articles/c2e09y4eqnjo |title=Lumb's debut double helps Leeds beat Hull |publisher=BBC Sport |date=28 April 2024}}</ref><ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/13013679/super-league-2024-fixtures-every-match-for-the-regular-season-plus-play-off-and-grand-final-dates |title=Super League 2024 fixtures: Every match for the regular season, plus play-off and Grand Final dates |publisher=Sky Sports |date=23 November 2023}}</ref>

===Huddersfield Giants (loan)===
On 17 March 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=17 Mar 2026|author=Matthew Shaw|title=Huddersfield Giants complete triple Leeds Rhinos loan swoop|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-leeds-rhinos-loan}}</ref>

===Hunslet RLFC (loan)===
On 30 April 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hunslet RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=30 Apr 2026|author=Callum Walker|title=Leeds Rhinos trio make Championship loan move|url=https://www.totalrl.com/leeds-rhinos-trio-make-championship-loan-move/}}</ref>
